conversations.text: I love hiking in the mountains. My favorite season is autumn and I prefer trail running.
I work as a senior engineer at Google on the Cloud team. Been there 3 years.
I'm allergic to peanuts and lactose intolerant. I take vitamin D supplements daily.
Actually I moved from New York to London last month. I no longer live in the US.
I speak English, Spanish, and some Japanese. I learned Spanish in college and picked up Japanese from anime.

searchQueries.query: What languages does the user speak?
